Enter Cyberspace

Cross an infinite procedural neon grid, ride light cycles, enter event arenas, and travel to the distant offworld ziggurat.

SYS:// Sypherdyne Grid
LINK STABLE
SECTOR 00-A
NODES 0/7
MODE ON FOOT
WEAPON NONE
OBJECTIVE // RECOVER SIGNAL NODES
ZIGGURAT RANGE 2600M
TARGET // ARENA
NEURAL LINK
X 0.0 / Y 0.0 / Z 0.0
SPEED 0 // SCORE 0
WASD move   Shift sprint   Space jump / double fly   E interact   V summon bike   B light wall   F fire   Q swap   mouse look   Esc release cursor
